tool_args.label: SCADA Systems Upgrades - Contract C34866

payload.description: Upgrade the supervisory control and data acquisition (SCADA) system at the Power Control Center, create a new back-up electronic power control center, and upgrade 13 control zones for the BMT division

construct the new back-up control center at the existing Jay Street Substation in Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 - Property Acquisition
tool_args.raw_text: Acquisition of property interests for Phase 2 of the Second Avenue Subway Project

payload.description: Acquisition of temporary easement property interests for support of excavation for the new sub-surface tunnel from 105th Street to 125th Street, then west along 125th Street to just past Lenox Avenue

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subject ACQUISITION OF PROPERTY INTERESTS FOR PHASE 2 OF THE SECOND AVENUE SUBWAY PROJECT

In connection with the construction of NYCT's Second Avenue Subway Project ("SAS"), a number of temporary easement acquisitions will be required for support of excavation for the new sub-surface tunnel that will run from 105 th Street to 125 th Street and then west along 125 th Street to just past Lenox Avenue.

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Project
tool_args.raw_text: Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Project - design/build project

payload.description: Replacement of sections of the Park Avenue Viaduct in phases between 115th Street to 123rd Street (Phase 1) and 127th Street to 132nd Street (Phase 2) and replacement of certain structural elements between East 123rd Street and East 128th St (Phase 3)

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subject ACQUISITION OF PERMANENT AND TEMPORARY EASEMENTS AND EXECUTION OF AGREEMENTS WITH THE CITY OF NEW YORK IN SUPPORT OF PARK AVENUE VIADUCT REPLACEMENT

As part of the MTA's capital plan, MTA C&D is undertaking the Park Avenue Viaduct Replacement Project (the "Project"). This is a design/build project that necessitates the replacement of sections of the Viaduct in phases between 115 th Street to 123 rd Street ("Phase 1") and 127 th Street to 132 nd Street ("Phase 2") and replacement of certain structural elements between East 123 rd Street and East 128 th St ("Phase 3") into a state of good repair.

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
